mapper.sql: ti.id, ti.team_id AS teamId, ts.name AS teamName, ts.description AS teamDescription, ti.inviter_id AS inviterId, ti.inviter_account_id AS inviterAccountId, inviter.nickname AS inviterName, inviter_account.account_name AS inviterAccountName, ti.invitee_id AS inviteeId, ti.invitee_account_id AS inviteeAccountId, invitee.nickname AS inviteeName, invitee_account.account_name AS inviteeAccountName, ti.target_role AS targetRole, ti.status, ti.expire_at AS expireAt, ti.create_time AS createTime
mapper.select: SELECT FROM team_invitation ti LEFT JOIN team_space ts ON ti.team_id = ts.id AND ts.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user inviter ON ti.inviter_id = inviter.id AND inviter.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_account inviter_account ON ti.inviter_account_id = inviter_account.id AND inviter_account.status = 1 AND inviter_account.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user invitee ON ti.invitee_id = invitee.id AND invitee.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_account invitee_account ON ti.invitee_account_id = invitee_account.id AND invitee_account.status = 1 AND invitee_account.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ti.id = #{_parameter} AND ti.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE team_invitation SET status = #{targetStatus}, reason = #{reason}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = #{pendingStatus} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE team_invitation SET flowable_instance_id = #{flowableInstanceId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
